description: Create function to generate devcontainer.json with conditional worktree bind-mount and color customization - Implement generateDevcontainerJSON(targetPath string) error that creates devcontainer.json. Use the template from _ignore/DESIGN.md. For worktrees, replace the placeholder '<PLACEHOLDER-FOR-WORKTREE-GIT-FOLDER>' with actual bind mount: 'source=${localWorkspaceFolder}/../../<primary-project-name>/.git,target=${localWorkspaceFolder}/../../<primary-project-name>/.git,type=bind,consistency=cached'. For primary branches, remove that line entirely. Use workspace.IsWorktree and workspace.GetPrimaryProjectPath to determine context. For workbench.colorCustomizations, reuse workspace.GenerateColorFromPath, workspace.GetContrastingForeground, and workspace.AdjustColorBrightness to generate the same color scheme as local.code-workspace files.
acceptance_criteria: generateDevcontainerJSON function checks if path is a worktree using workspace.IsWorktree
For worktrees, .git bind mount is added with correct relative path to primary project
For primary branches, no .git bind mount is added
Generated JSON matches the template structure in _ignore/DESIGN.md
workbench.colorCustomizations uses workspace.GenerateColorFromPath for consistent colors
Color scheme matches workspace file: baseColor for statusBar/titleBar, contrasting foreground, darker inactive

verification.value: Create test worktree and verify generated devcontainer.json has correct .git mount path and matching colors to workspace file
